Appearance

XBot ProgrammingFRC Documentation for Team 488

Learn to code competition robots. Built for high schoolers new to Java.

Start Curriculum
Code Examples
Tooling Guide

Curriculum

13 modules from Java basics to swerve drive. Each section has a quiz to test your knowledge.

Real Code

Examples pulled directly from TeamXbot2026, TeamXbot2025, and SeriouslyCommonLib.

Tooling

Guides for WPILib, PathPlanner, Phoenix Tuner, VSCode, Gradle, and AdvantageScope.

Two Teams, One Codebase ​

TeamFocus
Core ProgrammingDrive, mechanisms, autonomous, infrastructure
Vision ProgrammingAprilTag detection, pose estimation, path planning

How to Use This Documentation ​

  1. New to Java? Start at Environment Setup and work through in order.
  2. Know Java already? Jump to Robot Architecture.
  3. Need examples? Check the Examples section for real code from our robots.
  4. Setting up tools? See the Tooling section.

Quick Links ​

  • XbotEdu Wiki - Practice challenges
  • TeamXbot2026 - Current robot code
  • TeamXbot2025 - Last year's robot code
  • SeriouslyCommonLib - Shared library
  • WPILib Docs - Official FRC library docs

Built for XBot Robotics Team 488

FRC FIRST Robotics
